text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, August 13. You have backlog grooming with Greg at 1 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing our household budget today. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Refinancing is a great leverage point. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I've noted that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I can help with that. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sleep quality is so important. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. He is doing so well. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick log: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that looking over our mortgage options. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Budget tracking is updated. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. Greg Holloway wants to drop billing integration to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Let's break this down. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of billing integration now and iterating later is a good compromise. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Let's break this down. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Managing some allergy issues today. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! Staying active is key. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. I can help with that. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that writing scripts to process image datasets. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Busy day at Vertex Health. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
